calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Continued To Feb-26-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to FEB-26-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
